EnableGentleman.Description: Allow the Pinstripe Gentleman rarecrow to be sold in shops & festivals. Existing placed rarecrows are not affected.

EnableSeamstress.Description: Allow the Patchwork Seamstress rarecrow to be sold in shops & festivals. Existing placed rarecrows are not affected.

EnableSpiritsEve.Description: (Primary) Sell enabled rarecrows at Spirit's Eve (Pierre).

EnableTravelingCart.Description: (Alternate) Allow enabled rarecrows to appear in the Traveling Cart (Fall/Winter).

StockPerPlayer.Description: How many each player can buy per shop/event.

SpriteSet.Description: Choose which sprite set to use for all NBC rarecrows.

EnableNightMarket.Description: (Alternate) Allow enabled rarecrows to appear at the Night Market when the Traveling Cart is present (Winter 15-17).

PriceNightMarket.Description: Discounted price at the Night Market Traveling Cart (gold).

EnablePatchworkGuardian.Description: Allow the Patchwork Guardian rarecrow to be sold in shops & festivals. Existing placed rarecrows are not affected.

EnableSkeletonFarmer.Description: Allow the Skeleton Farmer rarecrow to be sold in shops & festivals. Existing placed rarecrows are not affected.

EnableSkeletonFarmerBones.Description: If enabled, the Skeleton Farmer rarecrow produces Bone Fragments daily while placed.

EnableGuardianCandy.Description: If enabled, the Patchwork Guardian produces Magic Rock Candy on Fall 26–27.

EnableGhostDog.Description: Allow the Ghost Dog rarecrow to be sold in shops & festivals. Existing placed rarecrows are not affected.

AllAreRare.Description: If true, all NBC rarecrows can only be purchased once per player (ever). If false, they reset based on stock limits.

EnableGhostDogGifts.Description: If enabled, the Ghost Dog rarecrow produces one themed item every other day while placed (seasonally weighted).

EnablePumpkinKing.Description: Allow the Pumpkin King rarecrow to be sold in shops & festivals. Existing placed rarecrows are not affected.

EnablePumpkinKingGifts.Description: If enabled, the Pumpkin King produces one themed item every other day in Fall and Winter while placed.

EnableSpiritsEveCostumeDrops.Description: If enabled, Spirit's Eve (Fall 27) grants costume hats for players who obtained the related NBC rarecrows.

{{ModId}}_Rarecrow_PinstripeGent.Name: Rarecrow_PinstripeGent
{{ModId}}_Rarecrow_PinstripeGent.Description: A tall, spooky guardian with refined, eerie charm.

{{ModId}}_Rarecrow_PatchworkSeamstress.Name: Rarecrow_PatchworkSeamstress
{{ModId}}_Rarecrow_PatchworkSeamstress.Description: A stitched-together sentinel with a sweetly haunting look.

{{ModId}}_Rarecrow_PatchworkGuardian.Name: Rarecrow_PatchworkGuardian
{{ModId}}_Rarecrow_PatchworkGuardian.Description: A lovingly stitched guardian that watches your fields with quiet care.

{{ModId}}_Rarecrow_SkeletonFarmer.Name: Rarecrow_SkeletonFarmer
{{ModId}}_Rarecrow_SkeletonFarmer.Description: A bony farmhand who never stops tending the fields.

{{ModId}}_Rarecrow_GhostDog.Name: Rarecrow_GhostDog
{{ModId}}_Rarecrow_GhostDog.Description: A spectral watchdog that quietly guards your fields.

{{ModId}}_Rarecrow_PumpkinKing.Name: Rarecrow_PumpkinKing
{{ModId}}_Rarecrow_PumpkinKing.Description: A cozy jack-o-lantern monarch that guards your fields from above a sturdy stake.

If PLAYER_HAS_MAIL Current {{ModId}}_SpiritsEve_MasksNote_First Received, !PLAYER_HAS_MAIL Current {{ModId}}_SpiritsEve_MasksNote_Return Mailbox ## AddMail Current {{ModId}}_SpiritsEve_MasksNote_Return Now

If !PLAYER_HAS_MAIL Current {{ModId}}_SpiritsEve_MasksNote_First Received, !PLAYER_HAS_MAIL Current {{ModId}}_SpiritsEve_MasksNote_First Mailbox, !PLAYER_HAS_MAIL Current {{ModId}}_SpiritsEve_MasksNote_Return Mailbox ## AddMail Current {{ModId}}_SpiritsEve_MasksNote_First Now

Entries.{{ModId}}_SpiritsEve_MasksNote_First: @,^^When the valley dons its shadows and the maze opens its mouth, we stand watch in the fields… and we remember.^^So we slipped a few festive masks into your keeping—just for this Spirit’s Eve. Wear them proudly, if you dare.^^Each mask bears the spirit of its guardian. Try them on and see which one feels like *you*.^^Wear a scarecrow’s mask, and we’ll know: tonight, we keep the crows—and the creeps—at bay together.^^Happy haunting…^^   -The Pumpkin King^   -The Skeleton Farmer^   -The Ghost Dog^^P.S. The others may argue, but everyone knows my candy is the best treat of all.^^   -The Patchwork Guardian[#]A Midnight Gift
Entries.{{ModId}}_SpiritsEve_MasksNote_Return: @,^^The air tastes the same tonight—cold, sweet, and full of footsteps that don’t always make tracks.^^Last Spirit’s Eve, you wore one of our faces and walked the dark paths without flinching. We noticed.^^So… we slipped another set of masks into your pockets. No fanfare. Just a quiet tradition.^^Keep the one that felt right last year… or switch it up, and see what kind of guardian you become this time.^^Whatever you choose, remember: we’re still out here, watching the rows.^^Happy haunting—again.^^   -The Pumpkin King^   -The Skeleton Farmer^   -The Ghost Dog^^P.S. Still the best candy. The others are… charming, though.^^   -The Patchwork Guardian[#]Midnight, Once More
